# Test: apx gen python — produces a proper Python package
#
# Verifies that 'apx gen python' scaffolds pyproject.toml and __init__.py
# hierarchy from API identity when org is configured.

# Setup: Create app with dependency
mkdir app
cd app
exec git init
exec apx init app --org=testorg --repo=myapp --non-interactive internal/apis/proto/services/users
exec apx add proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.2.3

# Generate Python overlays
exec apx gen python
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1

# pyproject.toml must exist with correct dist name
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/pyproject.toml
grep 'name = "testorg-payments-ledger-v1"' internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/pyproject.toml
grep 'include = \["testorg_apis\*"\]' internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/pyproject.toml
grep 'protobuf>=4.25' internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/pyproject.toml

# Namespace __init__.py uses pkgutil.extend_path
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/testorg_apis/__init__.py
grep 'extend_path' internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/testorg_apis/__init__.py

# Intermediate packages have __init__.py
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/testorg_apis/payments/__init__.py
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/testorg_apis/payments/ledger/__init__.py

# Leaf __init__.py exists
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/testorg_apis/payments/ledger/v1/__init__.py

# Regeneration is idempotent
exec apx gen python
exists internal/gen/python/proto/payments/ledger/v1/pyproject.toml
